title: Nature's Edge Glacial Apocalypse
description: The Minecraft world is struck by a massive cold wave, creating an ice tsunami that spreads across the world, flooding everything in its path.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e3fac77d05e76ae915239c2638444c21dc47f9a.png)

## Summary
The Minecraft world is struck by a massive cold wave, creating an ice tsunami that spreads across the world, flooding everything in its path. You, the inhabitant of this world, must flee the area of ​​the icy impact as quickly as possible and build a shelter to protect yourself and create your bunker.

## Your objectif
Using tools from other mods, secure your chests, create a warm place to safely house the animals of this world before death catches up with them.

## Mods
- The end of the world
- let's me despawn
- Not Enough Animation
- Embeddium
- Cloth Config API
- Almanac
- Oculus (for shaders)
- SecurityCraft
- Biome o Planty
